mapper.select: WITH active_users AS ( SELECT u.id AS user_id FROM woorido.users u WHERE u.account_status = 'ACTIVE' ), attendance AS ( SELECT mvr.user_id, COUNT(*) AS attendance_count FROM woorido.meetings m JOIN woorido.meeting_votes mv ON mv.meeting_id = m.id JOIN woorido.meeting_vote_records mvr ON mvr.meeting_vote_id = mv.id WHERE m.status = 'COMPLETED' AND m.completed_at IS NOT NULL AND m.completed_at <= #{cutoffAt} AND mvr.actual_attendance = 'ATTENDED' GROUP BY mvr.user_id ), vote_absence AS ( SELECT mvr.user_id, COUNT(*) AS vote_absence_count FROM woorido.meetings m JOIN woorido.meeting_votes mv ON mv.meeting_id = m.id JOIN woorido.meeting_vote_records mvr ON mvr.meeting_vote_id = mv.id WHERE m.status = 'COMPLETED' AND m.completed_at IS NOT NULL AND m.completed_at <= #{cutoffAt} AND mvr.choice = 'PENDING' GROUP BY mvr.user_id ), payment AS ( SELECT a.user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT TO_CHAR(at.created_at, 'YYYY-MM')) AS payment_months FROM woorido.account_transactions at JOIN woorido.accounts a ON a.id = at.account_id WHERE at.type IN ('SUPPORT', 'SUPPORT_AUTO') AND at.created_at <= #{cutoffAt} GROUP BY a.user_id ), overdue_monthly AS ( SELECT DISTINCT a.user_id, TRUNC(at.created_at, 'MM') AS month_key FROM woorido.account_transactions at JOIN woorido.accounts a ON a.id = at.account_id WHERE at.type = 'SUPPORT' AND at.balance_before = at.balance_after AND at.locked_before > at.locked_after AND at.created_at <= #{cutoffAt} ), overdue_total AS ( SELECT om.user_id, COUNT(*) AS overdue_count FROM overdue_monthly om GROUP BY om.user_id ), overdue_sequence_source AS ( SELECT om.user_id, om.month_key, ADD_MONTHS(om.month_key, -ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY om.user_id ORDER BY om.month_key)) AS grp_key FROM overdue_monthly om ), overdue_streak AS ( SELECT oss.user_id, COUNT(*) AS streak_len FROM overdue_sequence_source oss GROUP BY oss.user_id, oss.grp_key ), consecutive_overdue AS ( SELECT os.user_id, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN os.streak_len >= 2 THEN os.streak_len ELSE 0 END), 0) AS consecutive_overdue_count FROM overdue_streak os GROUP BY os.user_id ), feed_daily AS ( SELECT p.created_by AS user_id, TRUNC(p.created_at) AS day_key, LEAST(COUNT(*), 1) AS daily_count FROM woorido.posts p WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.created_at <= #{cutoffAt} GROUP BY p.created_by, TRUNC(p.created_at) ), feed_monthly AS ( SELECT fd.user_id, TO_CHAR(fd.day_key, 'YYYY-MM') AS month_key, SUM(fd.daily_count) AS monthly_count FROM feed_daily fd GROUP BY fd.user_id, TO_CHAR(fd.day_key, 'YYYY-MM') ), feed_total AS ( SELECT fm.user_id, SUM(LEAST(fm.monthly_count, 30)) AS feed_count FROM feed_monthly fm GROUP BY fm.user_id ), comment_daily AS ( SELECT c.created_by AS user_id, TRUNC(c.created_at) AS day_key, LEAST(COUNT(*), 3) AS daily_count FROM woorido.comments c WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.created_at <= #{cutoffAt} GROUP BY c.created_by, TRUNC(c.created_at) ), comment_monthly AS ( SELECT cd.user_id, TO_CHAR(cd.day_key, 'YYYY-MM') AS month_key, SUM(cd.daily_count) AS monthly_count FROM comment_daily cd GROUP BY cd.user_id, TO_CHAR(cd.day_key, 'YYYY-MM') ), comment_total AS ( SELECT cm.user_id, SUM(LEAST(cm.monthly_count, 90)) AS comment_count FROM comment_monthly cm GROUP BY cm.user_id ), likes_union AS ( SELECT pl.user_id, pl.created_at FROM woorido.post_likes pl WHERE pl.created_at <= #{cutoffAt} UNION ALL SELECT cl.user_id, cl.created_at FROM woorido.comment_likes cl WHERE cl.created_at <= #{cutoffAt} ), like_daily AS ( SELECT lu.user_id, TRUNC(lu.created_at) AS day_key, LEAST(COUNT(*), 5) AS daily_count FROM likes_union lu GROUP BY lu.user_id, TRUNC(lu.created_at) ), like_monthly AS ( SELECT ld.user_id, TO_CHAR(ld.day_key, 'YYYY-MM') AS month_key, SUM(ld.daily_count) AS monthly_count FROM like_daily ld GROUP BY ld.user_id, TO_CHAR(ld.day_key, 'YYYY-MM') ), like_total AS ( SELECT lm.user_id, SUM(LEAST(lm.monthly_count, 150)) AS like_count FROM like_monthly lm GROUP BY lm.user_id ), kick_total AS ( SELECT gv.target_user_id AS user_id, COUNT(*) AS kick_count FROM woorido.general_votes gv WHERE gv.type = 'KICK' AND gv.status = 'APPROVED' AND gv.target_user_id IS NOT NULL AND NVL(gv.closed_at, gv.created_at) <= #{cutoffAt} GROUP BY gv.target_user_id ) SELECT au.user_id AS USER_ID, NVL(att.attendance_count, 0) AS ATTENDANCE_COUNT, NVL(pay.payment_months, 0) AS PAYMENT_MONTHS, NVL(ot.overdue_count, 0) AS OVERDUE_COUNT, NVL(co.consecutive_overdue_count, 0) AS CONSECUTIVE_OVERDUE_COUNT, NVL(ft.feed_count, 0) AS FEED_COUNT, NVL(ct.comment_count, 0) AS COMMENT_COUNT, NVL(lt.like_count, 0) AS LIKE_COUNT, 0 AS LEADER_MONTHS, NVL(va.vote_absence_count, 0) AS VOTE_ABSENCE_COUNT, 0 AS REPORT_RECEIVED_COUNT, NVL(kt.kick_count, 0) AS KICK_COUNT FROM active_users au LEFT JOIN attendance att ON att.user_id = au.user_id LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.user_id = au.user_id LEFT JOIN overdue_total ot ON ot.user_id = au.user_id LEFT JOIN consecutive_overdue co ON co.user_id = au.user_id LEFT JOIN feed_total ft ON ft.user_id = au.user_id LEFT JOIN comment_total ct ON ct.user_id = au.user_id LEFT JOIN like_total lt ON lt.user_id = au.user_id LEFT JOIN vote_absence va ON va.user_id = au.user_id LEFT JOIN kick_total kt ON kt.user_id = au.user_id ORDER BY au.user_id
